'''zhohagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhapsodistic|rhapsodistic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhapsodistic|rhapsodistic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhohagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhohagithi|zhohagithi]] || [[word:zhohagiji|zhohagiji]] || [[word:zhohagishi|zhohagishi]] || [[word:zhohagiki|zhohagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhohaguthuthu|zhohaguthuthu]] || [[word:zhohagujuju|zhohagujuju]] || [[word:zhohagushushu|zhohagushushu]] || [[word:zhohagukuku|zhohagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhohaguthu|zhohaguthu]] || [[word:zhohaguju|zhohaguju]] || [[word:zhohagushu|zhohagushu]] || [[word:zhohaguku|zhohaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhohagufthuf|zhohagufthuf]] || [[word:zhohagufjuf|zhohagufjuf]] || [[word:zhohagufshuf|zhohagufshuf]] || [[word:zhohagufkuf|zhohagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhohagethe|zhohagethe]] || [[word:zhohageje|zhohageje]] || [[word:zhohageshe|zhohageshe]] || [[word:zhohageke|zhohageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhohagothotho|zhohagothotho]] || [[word:zhohagojojo|zhohagojojo]] || [[word:zhohagoshosho|zhohagoshosho]] || [[word:zhohagokoko|zhohagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhohagotho|zhohagotho]] || [[word:zhohagojo|zhohagojo]] || [[word:zhohagosho|zhohagosho]] || [[word:zhohagoko|zhohagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhohagofthof|zhohagofthof]] || [[word:zhohagofjof|zhohagofjof]] || [[word:zhohagofshof|zhohagofshof]] || [[word:zhohagofkof|zhohagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhohagïfthïf|zhohagïfthïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfjïf|zhohagïfjïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfshïf|zhohagïfshïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfkïf|zhohagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhohagïfthïfthïf|zhohagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfjïfjïf|zhohagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfshïfshïf|zhohagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfkïfkïf|zhohagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhohagïfthïf|zhohagïfthïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfjïf|zhohagïfjïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfshïf|zhohagïfshïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfkïf|zhohagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhohagïfthïf|zhohagïfthïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfjïf|zhohagïfjïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfshïf|zhohagïfshïf]] || [[word:zhohagïfkïf|zhohagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhohagæthæ|zhohagæthæ]] || [[word:zhohagæjæ|zhohagæjæ]] || [[word:zhohagæshæ|zhohagæshæ]] || [[word:zhohagækæ|zhohagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhohagathatha|zhohagathatha]] || [[word:zhohagajaja|zhohagajaja]] || [[word:zhohagashasha|zhohagashasha]] || [[word:zhohagakaka|zhohagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhohagatha|zhohagatha]] || [[word:zhohagaja|zhohagaja]] || [[word:zhohagasha|zhohagasha]] || [[word:zhohagaka|zhohagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhohagafthaf|zhohagafthaf]] || [[word:zhohagafjaf|zhohagafjaf]] || [[word:zhohagafshaf|zhohagafshaf]] || [[word:zhohagafkaf|zhohagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhohagasha|zhohagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhohagshësha|zhohagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhohagrosha|zhohagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhohagmusha|zhohagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhohagyasha|zhohagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhohagnkshësha|gozhohagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhohagnkrosha|gozhohagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhohagnkmusha|gozhohagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhohagnkyasha|gozhohagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhohahagasha|zhohahagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhohahagshësha|zhohahagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhohahagrosha|zhohahagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhohahagmusha|zhohahagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhohahagyasha|zhohahagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhohahagnkshësha|gozhohahagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhohahagnkrosha|gozhohahagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhohahagnkmusha|gozhohahagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhohahagnkyasha|gozhohahagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhehægasha|zhehægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhehægshësha|zhehægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhehægrosha|zhehægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhehægmusha|zhehægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhehægyasha|zhehægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhehægnkshësha|gozhehægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhehægnkrosha|gozhehægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhehægnkmusha|gozhehægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhehægnkyasha|gozhehægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhohfagasha|zhohfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhohfagshësha|zhohfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhohfagrosha|zhohfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhohfagmusha|zhohfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhohfagyasha|zhohfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhohfagnkshësha|gozhohfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhohfagnkrosha|gozhohfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhohfagnkmusha|gozhohfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhohfagnkyasha|gozhohfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
